nodes.itemHTML: • Handwritten Digits Recognitionstars3 - Handwritten digits recognition using Neural Networks and Ruby.

• What is 'hreflang'? - What is hreflang attribute and how it can affect your SERP.
• quewuistars0 - Simple and clean theme optimized for dark terminal themes. Includes status decorations for the current time, user, directory and git status.

• Speaking of Translation - Run by two outstanding experts in the field of translation and localization. You can listen to audio files covering their tips and opinions on the freelance translator's work.

• eMpTy Pages - Presents extremely detailed descriptions and opinions about localization management, collaborative translation platforms, translation management systems, machine translation, as well as the localization industry's biggest players.
• Google Cloud Developer's Cheat Sheetstars5.2k - Describe all GCP products in 4 words or less.
• SimpleLocalize CLIstars21 - A CLI for finding translation keys in project files.
• Gatsby Starter - WordPress Twenty Twentystars102 - A port of the WordPress Twenty Twenty theme to Gatsby using the new gatsby-source-wordpress@v4.

• 2019.11: 25+ Videos - Gatsby + WordPress (2019) Complete Course - The series focuses on how we can use WordPress as a headless CMS with a GraphQL schema to interface with. After setting up our WordPress site and theme, we'll move onto Gatsby and how we can use our new schema to generate content for our Gatsby site, programmatically generating pages, converting Gutenberg blocks to React components and finishing off the chapter with a focus on SEO in Gatsby.
• 2021.02: Announcing Gatsby’s New WordPress Integration
• 2021.02: Jason Bahl of WPGraphQL's role in the operating system for the web
• 2021.02: Torque News Drop: Jason Bahl and WPGraphQL
• 2021.02: Gatsby Launches New WordPress Integration, Expanding Support for Headless Architecture
• 2020.11: Announcing WPGraphQL v1.0
• 2020.07: My Long Journey to a Decoupled WordPress Gatsby Site
• WPGatsby - This plugin configures your WordPress site to be an optimized source for Gatsby.

• WPGraphQL Corsstars37 - This FREE plugin from @kidunot89 and @byfunkhaus claims to enable authentication with WPGraphQL to “just work” by allowing you to set CORS headers that GraphQL will accept, which means WordPress default auth cookies can be accepted.
• Total Counts for WPGraphQLstars5 - This FREE plugin from @builtbycactus exposes total counts to connections in the WPGraphQL Schema.
• WPGraphQL Metastars16 - This FREE plugin from @robertorourke exposes meta registered via the WordPress register_meta API to WPGraphQL.
• WPGraphQL Meta Querystars29 - Adds Meta_Query support to the WPGraphQL Plugin for postObject query args.
• WPGraphQL Persisted Queriesstars15 - This FREE plugin from @qz adds the ability to use Persisted Queries with WPGraphQL.
• WPGraphQL Offset Paginationstars9 - This FREE plugin from @enshrined adds basic offset pagination as opposed to the standard Cursor based pagination that ships with WPGraphQL.
• WPGraphQL Send Emailstars9 - This FREE plugin from @Ash_Hitchcock allows you to send emails via a simple mutation. Includes the abilitty to restrict sending to trusted origins.

• Headless Mode - Headless mode sets up a redirect for all users trying to access the site. The only requests that are granted admission are ones that are either trying to access the REST API, the WP GraphQL API, or any logged-in user looking to access the headless install to edit or create posts.
• WP JAMstack Deploymentsstars228 - WordPress plugin for JAMstack deployments on Netlify (and other platforms).
• 2018.08: Headless WordPress + Gatsby + Netlify continuous deployment - Guide showing how to create a WordPress + Gatsby + Netlify setup in a few simple steps.
• Gatsby Starter Blogstars5 - Blog starter with enough features to be production ready out of the box.

    Docs, Repostars49.2k | #LESS
• IAMstars303 - User accounts, authentication and authorization.

• SoloLearn — A cloud programming playground well-suited for running code snippets. Supports various programming languages. No registration required for running code but required when you need to save code on their platform. Also offers free courses for begginers and intermediate level coders.
• PyTest MonkeyType Introduction - Type Annotate an existing Python Django Codebase with MonkeyType.

• Microsoft 365 Developer Program — Get a free sandbox, tools, and other resources you need to build solutions for the Microsoft 365 platform. The subscription is a 90-day Microsoft 365 E5 Subscription (Windows excluded) which is renewable. It is renewed if you're active in development(measured using telemetry data & algorithms).
• Yanastars108 - Notebook app with rich-text notes, nested note organization and global search.
• clj-docker-clientstars167 - Idiomatic Clojure client for the Docker remote API. By @lispyclouds

• The Use of Locks in Physical Crime Prevention - James M Edgar and William D Mclnerey
• ordered-concurrentlystars3 - Go module that processes work concurrently and returns output in a channel in the order of input.
• Goyavestars841 - Feature-complete REST API framework aimed at clean code and fast development, with powerful built-in functionalities.

• cuckoo-filterstars146 - Cuckoo filter: a comprehensive cuckoo filter, which is configurable and space optimized compared with other implements, and all features mentioned in original paper is available.
• Everyday – Form new habits by doing things every day.
• Microsoft To Do – Microsoft cloud-based task management application based on Wunderlist technology.
• Topydostars523 – A powerful todo list application using the todo.txt format, positioned between todo.txt CLI and Taskwarrior.
• ShortLib – Collection of hundreds of shortcuts for Windows, Mac and Linux.
• Deep Work: Rules for Focused Success in a Distracted World by Cal Newport – Deep work is the ability to focus without distraction on a cognitively demanding task.
• Notion – An all-in-one very customizable workspace for notes, tasks, wikis and lists.
• LastPass – A freemium password manager that stores encrypted passwords online.
• Obie.ai – AI platform that brings all knowledge and documentation into one spot.
• go-ml-benchmarksstars14 - benchmarks for machine learning inference in Go.
• Bubblewrapstars1.6k - Sandboxing tool for use by unprivileged Linux users capable of restricting access to parts of the operating system or user data.
• MQTT TUIstars5 - Simple lightweight terminal based MQTT monitor and publisher.
• MQTT-Tilesstars33 - MQTT-based IoT dashboard visualization tool. Allows easy dashboards sharing. Works with any MQTT broker supporting the WSS protocol.
• VSMQTTstars1 - Simple MQTT client integrated in Visual Studio Code.
• sms2mqttstars2 - Docker Gateway to send/receive SMS through MQTT using an USB GSM dongle (gammu).
• chrome2mqttstars14 - Python program to enable MQTT control endpoints for chromecasts (both audio and video).
• nbiostars127 - High-performance, non-blocking, event-driven, easy-to-use, least-dependency networking framework written in Go.
• emoji-fzfstars2 - Configurable ZSH plugin for the excellent emoji-fzfstars16. It is heavily inspired by emoji-clistars360.
• harestars37 - A simple database management system that stores each table as a text file of line-delimited JSON.
• slack-botstars33 - Ready to use Slack Bot for lazy developers: Custom commands, Jenkins, Jira, Bitbucket, Github...
• go-zerostars7.9k - A web and rpc framework. It's born to ensure the stability of the busy sites with resilient design. Builtin goctl greatly improves the development productivity.
• blockystars631 - Fast and lightweight DNS proxy as ad-blocker for local network with many features.
• Gameplay for Data Flow - By James Urquhart. Mar 24, 2017.
• Uber, the not so disrupting disruptor? - By Simon Wardley. Sep 11, 2017.
• Blue pill or red pill? - Doctrine and doctrine phases by Simon Wardley. May 25, 2017.
• Is my diagram a map? - By Simon Wardley. May 12, 2017.

• Adding Context To The Wardley Map of Data Flow - How do you extract value from the jumble of components and value relationships by James Urquhart. Jan 12, 2017.
• A Simple Wardley Map of Data Flow - Building a Wardley Map from a value chain for "real time business automation" by James Urquhart. Dec 30, 2016.
• The data flow value chain - Exploring a value chain using a basic architecture of data flow by James Urquhart. Dec 22, 2016.
• macOS Web - macOS Big Sur Desktop experience for Web, built with Preact and Vite (Github projectstars739)
• Pilosastars2.2k - Open source, distributed bitmap index that dramatically accelerates queries across multiple, massive data sets.
• TiKV - Distributed transactional key-value database.

• TypinExamples - A sample project that demonstrates the usage of Typinstars151 framework with a Blazor SPA application (Xterm.js and custom web workers implementation in C# to emulate terminal experience in browser). Live demo.

• Android Studio — Android Studio provides the fastest tools for building apps on every type of Android device. Open Source IDE, free for everyone and the best to develop Android apps. Available for Windows,Mac,Linux and even ChromeOS!
• Nota - Pro writing app designed for local Markdown files.

• Appetize — Test your Android & iOS apps on this Cloud Based Android Phone/Tablets emulators and iPhone/iPad simulators directly in your browser. Free tier includes 1 concurrent session with 100 minutes usage per month. No limit on app size.
• Make a vanilla Node.js REST API - Building a REST API without using a framework like Express.

• Data Science in a Box - The core content of the course focuses on data acquisition and wrangling, exploratory data analysis, data visualization, inference, modelling, and effective communication of results.

• Sedgewick & Flajolet. An Introduction to the Analysis of Algorithm - Am advanced complete survey, intended only for the mathematically matured reader.

• Vrajitoru & Knight. Practical Analysis of Algorithms - A very accessible and brief book on algorithms analysis, with implemented code included.
• Motwani & Raghavan. Randomized Algorithms - A standard classic book.

• Mitzenmacher & Upfal. Probability and Computing: Randomization and Probabilistic Techniques in Algorithms and Data Analysis - Standard text for probability methods and their applications on randomized algorithms.

• Blazor WebAssembly : JavaScript Isolation - March 1, 2021 - Blazor WebAssembly : JavaScript Isolation, by Curious Drive. This video is about how you can isolate JavaScript files in Blazor applications. With JavaScript isolation you can load your JavaScript files only when needed. Source codestars111 .

• Blazor Power Hour: Blazor Layout Components - February 22, 2021 - Blazor Power Hour: Blazor Layout Components, with Ed Charbeneau.

• fzstars368 - Seamlessly adds fuzzy search to zstars13.1k's tab completion and lets you easily jump around among directories in your history.

• z.luastars2k - A command line tool which helps you navigate faster by learning your habits. An alternative to z.shstars13.1k with Windows and posix shells support and various improvements. 10x faster than fasd and autojump, 3x faster than z.shstars13.1k.

• Luciastars472 - 3kb library for tiny web apps.
• Laravel CommonMark Blogstars5 - Static-generator to use with Laravel. Utilizes CommonMark and FrontMatter and publishes directly into the public-folder.

• BSD Weekly. A free, once–weekly e-mail round-up of BSD news and articles.
• gaiastars1 - Originally a fork of Bureaustars22 adds new virtual environments info to the prompt: Kubernetess, virtualenv, rbenv and Java versions. Includes git status integration.
• linuxerstars2 - Inspired by Yaris Alex Gutierrez's classyTouchstars48, Yad Smood's ys, and the Bureaustars22 theme.
• FastAPI Cloud Authstars85 - Simple integration between FastAPI and cloud authentication services (AWS Cognito, Auth0, Firebase Authentication).
• Crosscan - Retail Analytics, IoT (PHP, React, Web, Mobile, Rust)
• MODLR - MODLR is business modelling and collaborative planning tool for connected financial planning process
• crux.land - A free registry service meant for hosting small ( < 10kB) single deno scripts.

• shared-rowstars9 - A specification for right-of-way (ROW) for a SharedStreets Reference.
• Hill climbing - Starting somewhere in the hilly "landscape" of solutions you go in the direction of steepest ascent until reaching the top of a hill. You might miss higher hills though.
• Sogou Workflowstars4.1k - Enterprise-grade programming engine aimed to satisfy most of the backend development requirements.
• Parquetstars831 - Columnar storage format available to any project in the Hadoop ecosystem, regardless of the choice of data processing framework, data model or programming language.
• Ecotalk - UK-based mobile network powered by renewable energy. Profits are used to buy land which is then given back to nature.
• Unison - Open source functional programming language based on a simple idea with big implications: code is content-addressed and immutable.
• Temporalstars1.9k - Open source microservices orchestration platform for running mission critical code at any scale.

• JSON IP — Returns the Public IP address of the client it is requested from. No registration required for free tier. Using CORS data can be requested using client side JS directly from browser. Useful for services monitoring change in client and server IPs. Unlimited Requests.
• GitGud — Unlimited private and public repositories. Free forever. Powered by GitLab & Sapphire. CI/CD not provided.
• Watomaticstars120 - Auto reply for WhatsApp so you can stop using it.
• OpenStreetMap - A crowdsourced map of the world with many layers, free to use under an open licence.
• IP2Tracestars8 - A traceroute tools that displaying geolocation information using IP2Location database. (MIT)
• Salt Guides and Tutorials, by Linode - A good collection of Salt guides and tutorials created and managed by Linode.
• Facebook - Official Salt Project Facebook account.
• Salt Project on Twitch - Salt Project's official Twitch channel.
• GitHub Changelog Generatorstars6.4k - Automatically generate change log from your tags, issues, labels and pull requests on GitHub.
• Muser - Using machine learning to enhance music visualization in the browser.
• Flax Models - Collection of models and methods implemented in Flax.
• Measuring Network Performance in Mobile Safari - An advices on using Mobile Safari for measuring network performance.

• Validotstars202 - Validot is a performance-first, compact library for advanced model validation. Using a simple declarative fluent interface, it efficiently handles classes, structs, nested members, collections, nullables, plus any relation or combination of them. It also supports translations, custom logic extensions with tests, and DI containers.
• BootstrapBlazorstars468 - A set of enterprise-class UI components based on Bootstrap and Blazor.
• Awesome Microservices .NET Corestars1k - A collection of awesome training series, articles, videos, books, courses, sample projects, and tools for Microservices in .NET Core.
• FlaxVisionstars11 - Flax version of TorchVision.
• Oryx - Probabilistic programming language based on program transformations.

• Journal of the Egyptian Society of Parasitology - Open-access (2013 - present) scientific journal of The Eyptian Society of Parasitology. Published since the 1970s, their archive is indexed in Pub-Med since 1972 (Index Medicus ISSN: 0253-5890).
• Filament - The elegant TALL stack admin panel for Laravel artisans.
• beartypestars250 - Unbearably fast O(1) runtime type-checking in pure Python.

nodes.itemHTML: • MonkeyTypestars3.4k - Collects runtime types of function arguments and return values, and can automatically generate stub files or even add draft type annotations directly to your Python code based on the types collected at runtime.

• p10k-promptconfigstars0 - adds the ability to easily switch between Powerlevel10k prompt theme config files by defining the P10K_PROMPT variable in your .zshrc file.
• encore.dev — Backend framework using static analysis to provide automatic infrastructure, boilerplate free code, and more. Includes free cloud hosting for hobby projects.
• Bagistostars3.6k - A Free and Opensource Laravel eCommerce framework built for all to build and scale your business.

• Solving y=mx+b with Jax on a TPU Pod slice - Mat Kelcey - A four part YouTube tutorial series with Colab notebooks that starts with Jax fundamentals and moves up to training with a data parallel approach on a v3-32 TPU Pod slice.
• Why Rust?

• Evolved channel selection by Mat Kelcey - Trains a classification model robust to different combinations of input channels at different resolutions, then uses a genetic algorithm to decide the best combination for a particular loss.
• Microsoft Teams — Microsoft Teams is a chat-based digital hub that brings conversations, content, and apps together in one place all from a single experience. Free for up to 500k users.
• Esper — MDM and MAM for Android Devices with DevOps. 100 devices free with 1 user license and 25 MB Application Storage.
• opeNode — Free Node.js hosting for Open Source projects. 100 GB Bandwidth/month with 100 MB memory & 1000 MB storage. Deploy using CLI or existing Git repository.
• github.com — FOSS for Devstars583 — A hub of free and Open Source software for developers.
• RedHat for Developers — Free access to Red Hat products including RHEL,OpenShift,CodeReady etc exclusively for developers. Individual plan only. Free e-Books also offered for reference.

• FingerprintJSstars13.3k - Identifies browser and hybrid mobile application users even when they purge data storage. Allows you to detect account takeovers, account sharing and repeated malicious activity.
• FingerprintJS Androidstars162 - Identifies Android application users even when they purge data storage. Allows you to detect account takeovers, account sharing and repeated malicious activity.
• Deterministic ADVI in JAX by Martin Ingram - Walk through of implementing automatic differentiation variational inference (ADVI) easily and cleanly with JAX.
• ngx-liquid-cachestars78 - A powerful, automatic and optimized Angular 2 cache system that fits everywhere!
• vcurrencystars2 - API wrapper (written in V) for https://api.exchangeratesapi.io.

• Maîtriser JMeter: Du Test de charge à Devops - By Antonio Gomes Rodrigues, Bruno Demion (Milamber) and Philippe Mouawad (Leanpub) 🇫🇷.
• JMeter / Devops/ CI-CD / Cloud - By xavki 🇫🇷.
• JMeter - Тестирование производительности - Discussion board by Software-Testing.ru 🇷🇺.
• Discord — Chat with public/private rooms. Markdown text, voice, video, and screen sharing capabilities. Free for unlimited users.
• Drive To Web — Host directly to the web from Google Drive & OneDrive. Static sites only. Free forever. One site per Google/Microsoft account.
• gym-pybullet-dronesstars229 - PyBullet-based Gym environments for single and multi-agent reinforcement learning of quadcopter control.
• PAIR-code/what-if-toolstars540 - A tool for Tensorboard or Notebooks which allows investigating model performance and fairness.
• EthicalML/xaistars644 - A toolkit for XAI which is focused exclusively on tabular data. It implements a variety of data and model evaluation techniques.
• GanttLab - The easy to use, fully functional Gantt chart for GitLab and GitHub.
• Authy - Two-factor authentication (2FA) on multiple devices, with backups. Drop-in replacement for Google Authenticator. Free for up to 100 successful authentications.
• emailwizstars627 - Luke Smith's bash script to completely automate the setup of a Postfix/Dovecot/SpamAssassin/OpenDKIM server on debian. GPL-3.0 Bash

• Overriding components in Blazor - February 27, 2021 - If you use a component library in your project, you might want to override a component somewhere deep down in the component hierarchy without having to override the whole hierarchy.

• W3C WoT - The W3C Working Group for the Web of Things (WoT) seeks to counter the fragmentation of the IoT by using and extending existing, standardized Web technologies. By providing standardized metadata and other re-usable technological building blocks, W3C WoT enables easy integration across IoT platforms and application domains.
• Garbage Collector - Part of a program that attempts to find and reclaim garbage pieces of memory not used anymore.
• alt-and-selectstars0 - Binds the alt-c (copy), alt-v (paste), alt-x (cut) keyboard shortcut to a commands: copy-region-as-kill, yank, kill-region. Remaps the execute command to Alt-Shift-X.
• regulastars375 - Evaluates Terraform infrastructure-as-code for potential AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud security misconfigurations and compliance violations prior to deployment.
